compressed_regions.summary: Multiple backward bulk-related features exhibit extremely low cardinality with unique values=1 and very low cardinality ratios, indicating near-constant values across the partition.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Avg Bulk Rate|Bwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Bwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Bwd PSH Flags|Bwd URG Flags
notes: cluster of backward bulk and flag features with minimal variability

contextual_modifiers: low variability may reflect saturation or uniform traffic behavior
uncertainty_notes: low cardinality may limit discriminative power
possible structural collapse or saturation effect

compressed_regions.summary: Forward bulk-related features similarly show extremely low cardinality with unique values=1 and minimal cardinality ratios, mirroring backward bulk feature behavior.

locality.scope_value: Fwd Avg Bulk Rate|Fwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Fwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Fwd URG Flags

compressed_regions.summary: Multiple feature pairs exhibit perfect or near-perfect correlation (correlation=1 or 0.9993), indicating strong linear dependencies and potential redundancy.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Fwd Header Length|Fwd Header Length.1|Fwd PSH Flags|SYN Flag Count|Fwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Fwd Segment Size|RST Flag Count|ECE Flag Count|Total Backward Packets|Subflow Bwd Packets|Total Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Packets|Total Length of Bwd Packets|Subflow Bwd Bytes|Total Length of Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Bytes|Packet Length Mean|Average Packet Size
notes: multiple pairs with correlation >=0.9993 indicating strong linear dependencies

contextual_modifiers: strong dependencies may indicate redundancy or derived features
uncertainty_notes: perfect correlations may reflect deterministic relationships or feature engineering
redundancy could affect model stability or interpretability

compressed_regions.summary: Backward packet length features show significant class-conditioned structural variation with high variance ratios and differing unique value counts between BENIGN and DDoS classes.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Max|Bwd Packet Length Mean|Bwd Packet Length Std|Avg Bwd Segment Size
notes: backward packet length and segment size features with class-conditioned variation

contextual_modifiers: structural variation may reflect class-specific traffic behavior
uncertainty_notes: variance ratios indicate potential discriminative structure but also class imbalance effects
unique value disparity may reflect sampling or feature resolution differences

compressed_regions.summary: Average Packet Size shows class-conditioned structural variation with moderate variance ratio and unique value disparity between BENIGN and DDoS classes.

notes: average packet size feature with class-conditioned variation

contextual_modifiers: moderate structural variation with class skew
uncertainty_notes: variance ratio lower than backward packet length features
unique value disparity may affect feature stability

compressed_regions.summary: Destination Port feature shows strong class-conditioned distribution differences with dominant ratio 1.0 and zero entropy for DDoS class, and moderate entropy and dominant ratio for BENIGN class, with high JS divergence.

notes: distributional differences sensitive to class representation

contextual_modifiers: distributional shift may reflect class-specific port targeting
uncertainty_notes: high divergence suggests strong representation sensitivity
zero entropy in DDoS may indicate uniform port usage or saturation

compressed_regions.summary: Partition-level observations indicate presence of duplicated rows and moderate class imbalance ratio, which may influence structural patterns and feature distributions.
contextual_modifiers: data quality and class distribution may affect downstream analysis
uncertainty_notes: impact of duplicates on feature stability is uncertain
class imbalance may bias structural interpretations

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Several flag count features (CWE Flag Count) also show extremely low cardinality with unique_values=1 and cardinality_ratio=1e-05, consistent with bulk rate features.
preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Consistent low cardinality pattern with bulk rate features suggests a broader structural uniformity in flag-related features.
uncertainty_notes: low cardinality may limit feature usefulness but may reflect saturation
